outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates on the Iran war: Status of US service member still unknown after fighter jet shot down
outlets.summary: CNN focuses on missing WSO and A-10 loss during SAR. Coverage of two US aircraft lost in single day.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: 2 U.S. planes are down and Iran hits Gulf refineries as the war wraps its 5th week
outlets.summary: NPR leads with dual aircraft losses and Gulf refinery strikes. Frames Day 35 as turning point in war.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: 1 pilot rescued after F-15E downed over Iran, search ongoing for 2nd crew member
outlets.summary: Fox focuses on rescue success, downplays A-10 loss. Highlights Trump's April 6 Hormuz deadline.

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: Trump promises 'decisive action' on Hormuz as April 6 deadline approaches
outlets.summary: Right-leaning outlets frame April 6 deadline as strength. Downplay Israeli opinion polls.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 35 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera frames conflict as 'US-Israeli attacks on Iran.' Comprehensive Day 35 liveblog. Death toll: 2,076+.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war: Two US warplanes lost as conflict enters sixth week
outlets.summary: BBC leads with dual aircraft losses. Reports on UK 40-nation Hormuz coalition and Meloni breaking with Trump.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: We will keep hitting Iran, in full coordination with Trump; 70% of steel capacity destroyed
outlets.summary: ToI reports Netanyahu's coordination with Trump claim. Steel capacity figure unverified. Liveblog format.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Why Israelis Are Losing Faith in the Iran War — support drops to 45.5%
outlets.summary: Haaretz poll: support dropped from 63% to 45.5%. Growing skepticism about war objectives and exit strategy.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran shoots down two US warplanes — SAR operations signal vulnerability
outlets.summary: Iranian media claims two US aircraft destroyed. Frames SAR as sign of US military vulnerability. Highlights bounty for missing WSO.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: Pasteur Institute destruction is war crime against all humanity
outlets.summary: Iran frames bridge/Pasteur Institute strikes as attacks on civilians. Araghchi: 'Every bridge will be built back stronger.'
